name: Pyromancer's Handbook
effect: Allows wielder to memorize 1 additional Pyromancy spell

name: Mariner's Prayerbook
effect: Allows wielder to memorize 1 additional Ocean's Call spell

name: Book of the Three Virtues
effect: Allows wielder to memorize 1 additional Great Storm spell

name: Scroll of Leaf and Stone
effect: Allows wielder to memorize 1 additional Arcadian spell

name: The Solar Gospel
effect: Allows wielder to memorize 1 additional Twin Moon spell

name: Black-bound Grimoire
effect: Allows wielder to memorize 1 additional Phantasm spell

name: Healing Powder
effect: restores 1D6 HP when applied to a wound

name: Antidote
effect: cures the consumer of the poison status effect

name: Sedative
effect: cures the consumer of the stupefied status effect

name: Dried Fruit
effect: restores 1 pt. of Stamina to a single party member with no preparation required; can be cooked as well

name: Salted Meat
effect: restores 1 pt. of Stamina to a single party member with no preparation required; can be cooked as well

name: Eye Drops
effect: cures the consumer of the blinded status

name: Absorbent Rag
effect: cleanses the user of being covered in fluids (water, oil, etc.)

name: Cold Salve
effect: cures the consumer of the burned status effect

name: Warming Salve
effect: cures the consumer of the frozen status effect as well as any pts. of freeze buildup

name: White Flame
effect: returns a dead party member to 1 HP; activates automatically if in dead unit's inventory

name: Tobacco Pinch
effect: grants 1 temporary HP when smoked (does not stack); calms the nerves

name: Lockpick
effect: Allows one with the training to do so to pick locks (Lockpick Talent req.)(Breaks if lockpick failed)

name: Trap Probe
effect: Allows one with the training to do so to disarm traps (Trapsmith Talent req.)(Breaks if disarm failed)

name: Pickaxe
effect: Can be used to mine for materials at designated spots (STR Check)(Durability: 6)

name: Shovel
effect: Can be used to dig through loose soil or sift through rubble (STR Check)(Durability: 10)

name: Lantern
effect: Illuminates immediate area. Requires Oil (from item / spell) Has 4 fuel pts. ; loses 1 fuel per use

name: Rope
effect: a coil of sturdy rope; essential tool for spelunking (25 ft. per item slot)

name: Grapple Hook
effect: can be anchored to a secure point to climb or rappel surfaces (25 ft. rope / counts as 'Rope' item)

name: Hunting Trap
effect: set up during camp (SRV Check 15+) may yield 1 animal meat after camp phase ends

name: Torch
effect: illuminates the room when lit- takes up a hand slot to hold; can also be used to ignite objects

name: Side Bag
effect: grants an additional 2 Encumbrance if equipped

name: Turpentine
effect: Can be thrown 4 tiles creating an oil tile; Can be ingited or used to fully refuel lanterns

name: Bedroll
effect: Taking a camping phase restores 1 Stamina with this in your inventory (just for its user)

name: Patch Kit
effect: Restores 1D6 pts. of durability to a tool, shield, etc. (1 use - can not be used to fix broken items)

name: Portable Grindstone
effect: (armorer talent req.) At camp grant +1 CRIT & DMG all allies' main weapons for 1 battle (Dur. 4)

name: Tailor's Kit
effect: A pouch of needles, threads, fastenings and the like; required to utilize the Tailor Talent

name: Spyglass
effect: A handheld brass telescopic device that allows the user to see distant objects with clarity

name: Fire Arrow
effect: (bow / Bowshot ammo) arrow that deals an additional 1D4 fire DMG

name: Spiral Arrow
effect: (bow / Bowshot ammo) Arrow that ignores a target's shield / armor

name: Winged Arrow
effect: (bow / Bowshot ammo) Arrow that gains +5 to range

name: Water Arrow
effect: (bow / Bowshot ammo) arrow that deals an additional 1D4 water DMG

name: Electric Arrow
effect: (bow / Bowshot ammo) arrow that deals an additional 1D4 electric DMG

name: Powder Bomb
effect: Explosive that deals 2D6 direct DMG in a 3x3 tile radius; can be thrown 4+STR tiles

name: Smoke Bomb
effect: Creates Smoke Tiles (see Effect Tiles; Combat Doc. for details) in 3x3 area (thrown 4+STR tiles)

name: Sharpness Oil
effect: (Slash / Pierce weapons) grants next 3 +1D4 DMG of weapon's type to unarmored foes

name: Venom Oil
effect: (Slash / Pierce weapons) grants next 3 strikes the chance to cause poison (resisted with VIT 12+)

name: Smoke Mortar
effect: (Mortar Ammo) Explosive shot that creates smoke tiles in a 3x3 tile radius; cloud lasts 3 rounds.

name: Flame Mortar
effect: (Mortar Ammo) Explosive shot that deals 2D6 fire DMG and creates fire tiles within in the blast radius

name: Caltrop Bundle
effect: (Trapper Talent NOT req.) Place on an empty tile; Deals 1D4 Pierce DMG and lowers MOVE by 1 for 2 rounds.

name: Tangle Trap
effect: Place on empty tile (Trapper Talent req.) Target loses their next Move Action if tripped.

name: Stinger Trap
effect: Place on empty tile (Trapper Talent req.) Causes Poison status if tripped.

name: Detonation Trap
effect: Place on empty tile (Trapper Talent req.) Explodes (3x3 radius) dealing 2D6+3 fire DMG in range

name: Needleburst Trap
effect: Place on empty tile (Trapper Talent req.) Deals 1D10+2 pierce DMG ignoring Pierce resistance

name: Flashflare Trap
effect: Place on empty tile (Trapper Talent req.) Causes Blind status if tripped

name: Winged Tunic
additionalEffects: Fall Recovery rolls made with advantage

name: Wilds Armor
additionalEffects: Poison resist rolls made with advantage

name: Salamander Mail
additionalEffects: Burned resist rolls made with advantage

name: Scrap Metal Cuirass
additionalEffects: Can also be repaired with Scrap Metal

name: Scrap Metal Platemail
additionalEffects: Can also be repaired with Scrap Metal

name: Silk Doublet
additionalEffects: Curse resist rolls made with advantage

name: Greatcoat
additionalEffects: Blinded resist rolls made with advantage

name: Scrap Metal Helm
additionalEffects: Can be repaired w/ Scrap Mtl. / headshot protec.

name: Scrap Metal Armguards
additionalEffects: Can also be repaired with Scrap Metal

name: Plate Skirt & Chausses
additionalEffects: Stagger resist rolls made with advantage

name: Ornate Dagger
rareAttribute: re-roll missed ATK once per turn

name: Tyrant Katana
rareAttribute: NPC only: crits reduce HP to 0

name: Elven Spear
rareAttribute: Phalanx DMG is not reduced to LDR

name: Spear of the 3rd Virtue
rareAttribute: Throw deals a HDR of Elec DMG

name: Fist of Yad
rareAttribute: deal LDR to knock target 1D4 tiles

name: Scrap Cutter
rareAttribute: can be used as a knife/pry/lever tool

name: Flare Refractor
rareAttribute: targets all units in linear range

name: Freeze Refractor
rareAttribute: targets all units in linear range

name: Shock Refractor
rareAttribute: targets all units in linear range

name: Deadeye Hazer
rareAttribute: DMG rolled as HDR if Braced

name: New Book of Mhire
effect: Allows wielder to cast spell: "Compel Spirits" / Grants dark resist (1) while equipped

name: Manual of Healing
effect: All HP restoration via items,abilities or spells is increased +1

name: Hymnal of the Battlemother
effect: Add +2 spellcast rolls when Charge Boosting

name: Hexgold Grimoire
effect: All saves imposed on targets via spellcasting gain +2 to their minumum threshold

name: Book of Rememberances
effect: Grants +1 MEM while equipped in Armaments

name: Grimoire of Calefaction
effect: Allows wielder to cast spell: "Burning Mist" / Grants ice/water resist (1) while equipped

name: Dueling Shield
rareAttribute: Parry rolls are made as LDR

name: Lightning Deflector
rareAttribute: make a perfect block for 3 dur.

name: Frostbite Edge
rareAttribute: inflict LD4 pts. of Freeze on hit

name: Bright Refractor
rareAttribute: targets all units in linear range

name: Umbral Refractor
rareAttribute: targets all units in linear range

name: Ionized Refractor
rareAttribute: targets all units in linear range

name: New Book of Mhire
effect: Allows wielder to cast spell: "Compel Spirits" / Grants dark resist (1) while equipped

name: Manual of Healing
effect: All HP restoration via items,abilities or spells is increased +1

name: Dueling Shield
rareAttribute: Parry rolls are made as LDR

name: Calhedite Armor
additionalEffects: Curse resist rolls made with advantage

name: Grimvine Armor
additionalEffects: Arcadian Spell rolls +1 / repairs self on camp

name: Assassin's Armor
additionalEffects: Gain advantage on Stealth / +1 CRIT Rate

name: Engineer Armor
additionalEffects: Poison status resistance rolls gain advantage

name: Sulfur Brigade Jacket
additionalEffects: DMG from explosions are halved (round up)

name: Saltcircle Platemail
additionalEffects: ATKs / spells made vs. undead or monsters +1

name: Automatic Armor
additionalEffects: Can only equip & remove at camp

name: B'tona Mechanized Infantry Armor
additionalEffects: Can only equip & remove at camp

name: Mask of Arcana
additionalEffects: Spellcast +1 / Blind resist rolls gain advantage

name: Calhedite Helm
additionalEffects: Stupefy and Stagger resist rolls: advantage

name: Ataran Miner Helm
additionalEffects: has a toggleable headlamp crystal (torch item)

name: Friendship Bracer
additionalEffects: choose an ally at the start of battle: +1 ATK

name: Leech Fingers
additionalEffects: Dealing melee DMG heals wearer 1 HP

name: Weighted Boots
additionalEffects: Allows wearer to walk the bed of water areas

name: Stormguard Greaves
additionalEffects: taking elec/wind DMG grants +1 EVA for 2 rnds

name: Boots of Connection
additionalEffects: Increase max charge of magic items by 1

name: Benozurath
description: The greataxe of Lamiiran legend wielded by their first queen, Amberil Daetus the Bond-Breaker that was used to annihalate the Pale Elves. It is red and pale blue like blood stained snow.

name: Shatterbrand
description: The Monster King and his legion once besieged Jezar for so long the Hunter-Crusaders began using shards of swords as daggers in the fray. This blade appeared after the seige was broken.
effect: Shatter Storm
additionalEffects: (Action) Raise Shatterbrand and fire each of its shards dealing 1D6+4 Pierce DMG to

name: Armor Of Adorim
description: The sanctified breastplate of Saint Adorim. It is said this once mundane brass armor became radiant with sacred magic on its own during his martyrdom protecting his flock in the ruins.
additionalEffects: BAR +2 Sacrifice 5 of your own HP to release a pulse of light that restores 10 HP to all
effect: Martyr's Ward

name: Hammer Of The Hidden Virtue
description: The hidden weapon of the Maazenite Faith given by their God himself and the final piece of the Arsenal of the Sky: This hammer embodies the fourth, unspoken Virtue of destruction.
effect: Virtuous Destruction
additionalEffects: (Action) strike your target dealing this weapon's DMG as well as an additional

name: Ta'chumōs
description: The mythical weapon carried by one of the two original God-Ascendants, The Spearman, avatar of the fight; the fight within- the constant fight for survival. It feels perfect in the hand.

name: Mistlight
description: Vibrant turquoise handle wrapped in pearl pink cloth, shining blade tinged blue like the brine; a weapon spoke of in maritime legends from pirate lord to adventurer extrordinaire.
effect: Rising Tide
additionalEffects: Each successful strike with Mistlight grants it 1 'charge' granting the wielder +1 ATK.

name: Twin Moon Sceptres
description: Two magic rods of immense power that can never be seperated; One a white cresent moon, one a black new moon. The were the chosen tools of Trovanhim before his ascension.

name: Thread Of Starlight
description: A dark silver katana with a razor-thin blade. In legend, this blade was forged for the Gothrin blademaster,Yotiro Moonchaser to assist him in slaying the Ancient Dragon of Morda

name: Silver Lion Claw
description: The Battlemother Althea shattered, lost and destroyed many weapons in her eternal conquest against monster-kind, but this silver knife was her only constant armament.

name: Ivory Sword Ring
description: Summon a floating white sword of energy that can you can command to make a 1D6 Slash DMG ATK (+INT) in melee using move action (lasts 1D4 rnds)
curseEffects: Can not unequip unless 1 Seeker Stone is sacrified

name: Crest Of Cloudless Woods
description: Grants wearer immunity to status effects caused by Flora enemies and plant-based traps (mushroom spores, vines, etc.) Grants +1 VIT as well.

name: Ring Of Fortune
description: Grants the wearer an additional Luck Token slot (base Luck Tokens that can be held increased from 2 to 3).

name: Agent's Ring
description: Grant yourself advantage on your next stealth roll and advantage on any Concentration: Hearing rolls made while hidden while effect active.

name: Javelin Ring
description: Boost the wearers throw distance with grenades and throwing weapons by +2

name: Ring Of Strength
description: Increases STR ATTR +1; Also increases item throw range, bow range and carry capacity by 1 pt.

name: Hailstone Ring
description: Grants the wearer the ability to cast a freezing bolt: Deals 1D6 Ice DMG to a target within 7 tiles Also inflicts 1D4 pts. of the Freeze status effect

name: Ring Of The Diplomat
description: Grants wearer +2 to Diplomacy, Disposition and Persuasion checks (CHA) as well as the knowledge of which form of speech will be most effective.
curseEffects: Cannot remove ring while in conversation; -5 Misinfo. checks

name: Sable Sword Ring
description: Summon a floating black sword of energy that can you can command to make a 1D6 pierce DMG ATK (+MEM) melee using move action (lasts 1D4 rnds)
curseEffects: Can not unequip unless 1 Seeker Stone is sacrified

name: Ring Of Iron Courage
description: Gain +1 ARM when Locked-up with an opposing unit

name: Winnower's Ring
description: Grants the wearer advantage on Nature checks (SRV) and advantage on ATKs made toward Floral enemies.

name: Ruby Of The Red Lady
description: The wearer evades the first strike made towards them during every new battle they participate in.

name: Firehand Ring
description: Grants the wearer the ability to cast a small fireball: deals 1D6 fire DMG in a 5 tile range. Also inflicts the Burned status effect (resist status with VIT 10+)

name: Ring Of Retaliation
description: Grants the wearer the 'Counter' attribute with all equipped melee weapons (costing 1 ring charge to perform).

name: Zandor Flute
description: User can make a Performance roll to play a tune (CHA 12+). If successful, restore 1D6 HP to self/target within earshot. (takes Main Action)
curseEffects: Critical fail rolls deal 1D4 Sound DMG to your target instead.

name: Guiding Glowstone
description: Attached to the belt or on a bag; Illuminates the immediate area in a warm yellow light. Can be toggled on and off with a whisper.

name: Jade Feather
description: A small jade colored feather strung around a circle of black beads. Increases ATK & DMG rolls made with ranged weapons by +1.

name: Repulsor Band
description: A metal band infused with advanced shielding technologies and magics; Takes action to activate- nullifies physical projectiles for 1D4 rounds.

name: Journeyman's Chain
description: Grants wearer advantage on extraction, cooking and foraging rolls

name: Creeper Sucker
description: Allows the wearer to perform the Creeper ability "Creeper Venom" (no STAM cost) perform an ATK that deals 1D4 crush DMG; may poison target (resisted: VIT 13+)
curseEffects: Inflicts Light DMG weakness on wearer (1 level)

name: Fallen Warden Eye
description: Gain the ability to use your Movement Action to increase your next ATK roll by +3.

name: Ancient Seeker Stone
description: Increases wearer's Spell Memory by +1 (a new spell can be memorized immediately upon equipping).

name: Amulet Of Blades
description: The wearer boosts any slashing DMG dealt by +2

name: False Knight's Jewel
description: A cracked blue gem on a chain. Grants the wearer Shield training as long as this item is equipped.

name: Master's Cape
description: Grant the wearer a training of their choice while wearing this item.

name: Cleansing Beads
description: Bright blue beads that look very old, perhaps for use in prayer; Cures the wearer of any status effect using their action to do so.

name: Cavalier's Charm
description: A pendant made of brass that has an inked etching of a lance wielding horseman upon it. All of the wearer's melee weapons gain the 'Charge!' attribute
curseEffects: Missed 'Charge!' ATKs cost the attacker 1 STAM

name: Razor Scale
description: The silvery scale of a Razorfish; Lowers the wearer's Critical Hit Threshold by 1 pt.

name: Charm Of Exona
description: Grants the wearer 1D6 temporary HP at the beginning of a battle (is lost once the battle ends).

name: Charm Of Iridess
description: The wearer immediately gains knowledge of Undead enemy's weaknesses upon entering combat with them.

name: Charm Of Mhire
description: The wearer gains an innate level of resistance (1) to all DMG dealt to them from Undead enemies.

name: Charm Of Trovanhim
description: Lower the Spell Memory cost of Advanced and Master level spells by 1 pt.

name: Charm Of Althea
description: Gain advantage on Initiative rolls when a Monster-type unit is in the enemy party.

name: Charm Of Guul-nok
description: Increase the DMG dealt via the poison and needled status effect by 1 per activation and increase their duration by 1.

name: Charm Of Ronash
description: Invert the values of your ARM and BAR stats while equipped.

name: Charm Of The Red Lady
description: Negate an imposed Disadvantage roll making it a standard 1D20 roll.

name: Metallic Eye Stone
description: a shiny, metallic smithing stone that resembles an angered eye
effect:
Simple (Weapon, 15 SV): this weapon loses its ATTR DMG scaling but increases its base DMG die 1 DT.
Smasher (Weapon, 15 SV): grants this weapon the "Bludgeon" attribute (adds small rounded metal plate to weapon)
Plated (Armor, 20 SV): [Chest only] ARM+1 / lower EVA and MOVE by 1 when equipped
Unbreakable (Armor, 10 SV): This armor piece can not be broken
Sturdy (Shield, 20 SV): Increase shield's durability stat by +3

name: Gleaming Eye Stone
description: a pure-white smithing stone that has the likeness of a peaceful, closed eye
effect:
White (Weapon, 25 SV): this weapon can harm Apparition-type units and gains advantage on ATKs to all undead
Respite (Armor, 15 SV): [Main Armor] While equipped, no longer lose 1 Stamina after a combat scenario

name: Barbed Eye Stone
description: a blackened smithing stone that resembled a painfully impaled eyeball.
effect:
Spiked (Weapon, 15 SV): grants this weapon the "Thrust' attribute (adds small metal spike to weapon)
Thorned (Armor, 15 SV): enemies making melee ATKs or Martial Maneuvers towards you take 1 pierce DMG
Striker (Shield, 15 SV): Boost shield's Bash DMG by 1 DT

name: Crimson Eye Stone
description: a dark-red smithing stone that seems to depict a furious, bloodshot eye.
effect:
Razor (Weapon, 25 SV): this weapon doubles initial DMG rolls (before SPD is added) on critical hits.
Keen (Weapon, 25 SV): this weapon gains a lowered Crit Rate by 1 pt.
Lucky (Armor, 25 SV): Crit DMG resistance (1)
Duelist (Shield, 30 SV): grant Parry action (standard 1D6 risk) to shield or lower existing Parry risk 1 DT

name: Prismatic Eye Stone
description: a rainbow smithing stone that resembles a milky, blinded eyeball.
effect:
Beam (Weapon, 50 SV): this weapon can fire a 1D6 light (or enchant element) DMG beam (8 tile rng / takes action)
Mirrored (Armor, 40 SV): [Iron material only] BAR +1 / deal 1 Direct DMG back to the caster if hit with an offensive spells
Beam (Shield, 50 SV): this weapon can fire a 1D6 light (or enchant element) DMG beam (8 tile rng / takes action)

name: Silver Eye Stone
description: a shiny silver smithing stone that has the thin, sharp pupil of a snake's eye.
effect: Silver (Weapon, 20 SV): this weapon deals HDRs to Monster type enemies and disrupts Sylvan enemies' auras

name: Amber Eye Stone
description: a glowing orange smithing stone that looks like a blankly staring eyeball.
effect:
Disruption (Weapon, 100 SV): this weapon's strikes disrupts a warden construct's defense field for 1D4 rounds.
Warden (Armor, 100 SV): [Main Armor] Armor emits a Defense Field: Ranged ATK immunity while at Max HP

name: Gold Eye Stone
description: a smithing stone made of gold that looks like an eye squinting in glee
effect: Golden (Weapon, 25 SV): weapon loses ATTR scaling but boosts elemental enchantments by 1 DT in DMG.

name: Violet Eye Stone
description: a vibrant purple smithing stone that has the likeness of a crazed, wide eye.
effect:
Psyonic (Weapon, 30 SV): user adds their MEM attribute total to DMG rolls instead of STR or FNS
Mind-Shield (Armor, 30 SV): [Helm] Armor adds BAR+1
Mage's (Armor, 30 SV): Armor grants +1 to Spellcasting rolls
Returning (Shield, 25 SV): grant shield throw action: deals Bash DMG at 3+STR range (costs 1 durability); returns to user

name: Celadon Eye Stone
description: a muted green smithing stone formation that resembles a shifty, half-shut eye.
effect:
Swift (Weapon, 30 SV): user adds their SPD attribute total to DMG rolls instead of STR or FNS
Shattering (Weapon, 30 SV): grants this weapon the "Splitter' attribute
Flexile (Armor, 30 SV): [Legs] Armor adds EVA +1
Defender (Shield, 30 SV): Lower Block check requirement for this shield by 2 pts.

name: Teal Eye Stone
description: a bright blue smithing stone that seemingly depicts a sleepy closing eyeball.
effect:
Lightweight (Weapon, 15 SV): Lower weight by 1
Balanced (Weapon, 20 SV): grants this weapon advantage on throwing ATKs
Lightweight (Armor, 10 SV): Lower weight by 1
Lightweight (Shield, 10 SV): Lower weight by 1 pt.

name: Frenzied Eye Stone
description: a pink smithing stone with dozens of suffering eyes budding from one another

name: Heavy Arthread
effect:
Ironthread (Weaving, 20 SV): [Main] adds +1 ARM to a clothing item
Traumathread (Weaving, 15 SV): [Helm] adds Crit resistance (1) and Headshot protection
Powerthread (Weaving, 25 SV): [Gloves] adds +1 to ATK rolls

name: Spiral Arthread
effect:
Mirrorthread (Weaving, 20 SV): [Main] adds +1 BAR to a clothing item
Mindthread (Weaving, 25 SV): [Gloves] adds +1 to spellcasting rolls

name: Feather Arthread
effect: Springthread (Weaving, n/a SV): [Boots] grants wearer +1 Jump distance and elevation

name: Flame / Inferno
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) fire DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Pyromancy

name: Frost / Blizzard
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) ice DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Ocean's Call

name: Lightning / Fulgur
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) elec. DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Great Storm

name: Water / Torrent
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) water DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Ocean's Call

name: Gale / Storm
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) wind DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Great Storm

name: Radiant / Incandescent
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) light DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Twin Moon

name: Darkness / Void
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv. dark DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Twin Moon

name: Thunder / Sonic
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) sound DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Phantasm

name: Corrosion / Mordant
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) toxic DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Arcadian

name: Psychic / Augur
effect: Permanently add 1D4 (Std.) or 1D6 (Adv.) mind DMG; Weapon loses ATTR Scaling
description: Phantasm

name: Venom
effect: This weapon poisons the target upon critical hit or dealing its max (base DMG)

name: Burning
effect: This weapon burns the target upon critical hit or dealing its max (base DMG)

name: Bloodspike
effect: This weapon needles the target upon critical hit or dealing its max (base DMG)

name: "Plus" (+ #)
effect: Boost ATK by +1, 2 or 3 (adv.) depending on the ENCH Lv. (can stack w/ other enchantments)

name: Ethereal
effect: This weapon ignores its target's ARM value
description: Phantasm

name: Bound
effect: This weapon returns to its user after being thrown (instant re-equip)

name: Force
effect: This weapon knocks its target back 1D4 tiles upon critical hit or dealing its max (base DMG)

name: Flame
effect: [Main Armor] add fire (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 fire back to attacker
description: Pyromancy

name: Frost
effect: [Main Armor] add ice (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 ice back to attacker
description: Ocean's Call

name: Lightning
effect: [Main Armor] add elec. (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 elec. back to attacker
description: Great Storm

name: Water
effect: [Main Armor] add water (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 water back to attacker
description: Ocean's Call

name: Wind
effect: [Main Armor] add wind (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 wind back to attacker
description: Great Storm

name: Radiant
effect: [Main Armor] add light (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 light back to attacker
description: Twin Moon

name: Darkness
effect: [Main Armor] add dark (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 dark back to attacker
description: Twin Moon

name: Aural
effect: [Main Armor] add sound (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 sound back to attacker
description: Phantasm

name: Corrosion
effect: [Main Armor] add toxic (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 toxic back to attacker
description: Arcadian

name: Psychic
effect: [Helm] add mind (1) resistance / [Shield] when blocking deal 1D4 mind back to attacker
description: Phantasm

name: Purifying
effect: [Main Armor] add poison immunity

name: Telekinetic
effect: [Glove] gain ability to pull small objects towards you that are nearby (3 tiles in combat)
description: Phantasm

name: Deflection
effect: [Glove] gain ability to block in melee (16+) if user has a hand free

name: Silent
effect: [Boots] gain advantage on stealth checks; Footsteps make no sound
description: T. Moon / Phantasm

name: Shielded
effect: [Boots] Ignore the effects of Effect Tiles

name: Speed
effect: [Boots / Legs] armor grants +1 MOVE

name: Repelling
effect: [Shield] knock target back 1D4 tiles when blocking an ATK in melee
description: Phantasm / G.Storm

name: Healing
effect: [Main / Helm] Restore 1D4 HP after a successful combat scenario concludes

name: Spellbreak
effect: [Shield] gain the ability to block magic attacks (same rolls / outcomes as standard block action)

name: Monster Meat
effect: Grants party +1 ATK during next battle

name: Bug Meat
effect: Grants party poison resist advantage during next battle

name: Desert Fruit
effect: Grants immunity to Heat Wave weather effect until next rest

name: Green Vegetable
effect: Grants party +1 temporary STAM

name: Bread
effect: Grants party +3 temporary HP

name: Forest Berries
effect: Grants water resistance (1) until next rest

name: Sweet Mushroom
effect: Grants mind resistance (1) until next rest

name: Spicy Mushroom
effect: Grants ice resistance (1) until next rest

name: Chilling Mushroom
effect: Grants fire resistance (1) until next rest

name: Rock Fish
effect: Grants electric resistance (1) until next rest

name: Tea Leaves
effect: increases all INT checks by +1 until next rest

name: Coffee Beans
effect: increases overworld travel distance by +2 until rest

name: Honey
effect: grants +3 Temporary HP

name: Desert Spice
effect: increases all checks by +1 until next rest

name: Black Pepper
effect: grants party MOVE +1 until next rest

name: Alanos Starspice
effect: grants a permanent +1 STAM to the party

name: Mhiridian Blackherb
effect: grants ability to target Apparitions until next rest

name: Grast Ale
effect: intoxication +1 / cures stat debuffs and status effects

name: Mordegal Bourbon
